final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic editorial screenshot of a TikTok (Douyin) live stream featuring the actress known as "神仙姐姐" (Liu Yifei lookalike), filmed in 9:16 vertical format.

Style/medium: photorealistic mobile screenshot simulation, mimicking a real Douyin live broadcast UI with on-screen overlays, comment scrolls, and viewer count badges
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame, medium close-up shot of the host from chest up, centered subject, front-facing camera angle typical of mobile live streaming
Subject: a beautiful young Chinese woman resembling "神仙姐姐", elegant and graceful appearance, holding up a handwritten or printed sign with both hands at chest level; the sign reads exactly: "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Scene/backdrop: indoor live streaming setup, soft ring-light glow, blurred neutral or warm-toned background suggesting a cozy home or studio environment
Lighting/mood: soft frontal ring light, warm and flattering, bright and welcoming mood suitable for a live broadcast
Color palette: warm skin tones as anchor, soft background neutrals, Douyin UI elements in red and white accent colors
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign held by the host; Douyin-style UI overlay text including live viewer count and scrolling comments
Constraints: must look like a genuine Douyin app live stream screenshot with authentic UI chrome (top bar with host name, heart/gift icons, comment feed on lower portion of screen); sign text must be legible and clearly visible
Avoid: blurry or illegible sign text, distorted hands or fingers, generic Western streaming UI, over-saturated skin, watermarks unrelated to Douyin UI
